name: Yinhua HSCEI Graded QDII
summary: Yinhua HSCEI Graded QDII is a fund that tracks the performance of the Hang Seng China Enterprises Index (HSCEI) and is structured as a graded fund, allowing Chinese investors to invest in Hong Kong equities. As a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII), it provides access to overseas markets. It is managed by Yinhua Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
